name: bijou-web
requirements: Xterm.js or raw DOM grid for display

userStory.iWant: to run my Bijou TUI in a web browser
userStory.soThat: I can share interactive demos, build cloud shells, and unify my CLI and Web tools.

acceptanceCriteria: A WebRuntime adapter implements the RuntimePort for browsers
A WebIO adapter implements the IOPort using Xterm.js (or DOM)
A WebStyle adapter implements the StylePort using CSS/Canvas
The exact same App code runs in both Node.js and the Browser
backwardCompatibility: Zero changes required to core bijou or bijou-tui packages.

outScope: Full Node.js polyfills (no 'fs' or 'child_process' in the browser runtime)

testPlan.goldenPath: Compile the 'Release Workbench' example using Vite and the Web adapters. Verify that the TUI renders correctly in Chrome and responds to keyboard input.
edgeCases: Responsive resizing in a variable-width browser tab
Displaying TrueColor/Hex values correctly across different browser engines
testPlan.fuzzStress: Simulate 1000 resize events per second and measure the browser's paint performance.
failureCases: Missing browser APIs in older environments (Graceful degradation)
